#  Export a PCCO to ERP 
##### ERP DOCUMENTATION
**Each Procore-built ERP integration offers its own unique feature set.** Your integration might not support the action described on this page.
To learn about your integration and its supported features, see [Which ERP integrations are supported by Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-erp-integrations-are-supported-by-procore)
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** : 
    * You need both:
      * 'Standard' or 'Admin' on the company's ERP Integrations tool.
      * The person's account must be granted the 'Can Push to Accounting' privilege in the Company Directory. See [Grant Accounting Approver Privileges](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/grant-accounting-approver-privileges).
  * **Prerequisites** :
    * The Prime Contracts and Change Orders tools must be enabled on the project(s) that you want to sync.
  * **Requirements** :
    * There must be a Prime Contract synced between the Procore Project and your ERP system.
    * The 'Date Created' field on the PCCO is required.
    * The PCCO must be in the 'Approved' status.


##  Steps 
  1. [Create a PCCO](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-a-prime-contract-change-order)
  2. [Send a PCCO to ERP Integrations for Accounting Acceptance](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/send-a-pcco-to-erp-integrations-for-accounting-acceptance)
  3. [Accept or Reject a PCCO for Export to ERP ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/accept-or-reject-a-pcco-for-export-to-erp)


## See Also
  * [Accept or Reject a PCCO for Export to ERP](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/accept-or-reject-a-pcco-for-export-to-erp)
  * [Export a Commitment Change Order (CCO) to ERP](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/export-a-cco-to-erp)
  * [Resend a Rejected PCCO to ERP Integrations for Accounting Acceptance](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/resend-a-rejected-pcco-to-erp-integrations-for-accounting-acceptance)
title: Export a PCCO to ERP
description: Export a Prime Contract Change Order (PCCO) to your ERP system.
